## Type of change
- [ ] `type:bug` (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `type:feature` (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `type:enhancement` (improving existing functionality)
- [ ] `type:chore` (tooling, CI, dependencies)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (no ESLint errors).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] I have added/updated API documentation (if creating a new endpoint).
